01732|       const multiQuote = await relayAPI.getMultiInputQuote({
01733|         user: address,
01734|         origins,
01735|         destinationCurrency: batchToToken.address,
01736|         destinationChainId: batchToChain.id,
01737|         tradeType: 'EXACT_INPUT',
01738|         recipient: execBatchRecipient,
01739|       })
01740| 
01741|       console.log('Fresh batch quote received:', multiQuote)
01742|       console.log('Steps in quote:', multiQuote.steps.map(s => ({ id: s.id, kind: s.kind, itemCount: s.items?.length })))
01743| 
01744|       const { sendTransaction: sendTx, waitForTransactionReceipt } = await import('wagmi/actions')
01745|       const { wagmiConfig } = await import('@/lib/blockchain/wagmi')
01746| 
01747|       // Safe bigint conversion — handles '0x0', '0', '', undefined, null
01748|       const toValue = (v: string | undefined | null): bigint => {
01749|         if (!v || v === '0x0' || v === '0x' || v === '0') return 0n
01750|         try { return BigInt(v) } catch { return 0n }
01751|       }
01752| 
01753|       // Collect ALL transaction-kind steps in order (approve, deposit, swap, etc.)
01754|       const txSteps: Array<{
01755|         stepId: string
01756|         stepLabel: string
01757|         to: `0x${string}`
01758|         data: `0x${string}`
01759|         value: bigint
01760|         checkEndpoint?: string
01761|       }> = []
01762| 
01763|       for (const step of multiQuote.steps) {
01764|         if (step.kind !== 'transaction' || !step.items?.length) continue
01765|         for (const item of step.items) {
01766|           const d = item.data
01767|           txSteps.push({
01768|             stepId: step.id,
01769|             stepLabel: step.id === 'approve' ? 'Approval' : step.id === 'deposit' ? 'Deposit' : step.action || step.id,
01770|             to: d.to as `0x${string}`,
01771|             data: d.data as `0x${string}`,
01772|             // Never forward Relay's maxFeePerGas/maxPriorityFeePerGas — they are set at
01773|             // quote time and become stale. If the current base fee exceeds the quoted
01774|             // maxFeePerGas, MetaMask simulates the tx as failing. Let the wallet pick
01775|             // current gas prices; calldata validity is independent of gas price.
01776|             value: toValue(d.value),
01777|             checkEndpoint: item.check?.endpoint,
01778|           })
01779|         }
01780|       }
01781| 
01782|       console.log('Total tx steps to execute:', txSteps.length, txSteps.map(s => s.stepId))
01783| 
01784|       if (txSteps.length === 0) {
01785|         toast.error('No transactions to execute in quote.')
01786|         setIsSwapping(false)
01787|         return
01788|       }
01789| 
01790|       toast.info(`Executing ${txSteps.length} step(s)...`)
01791| 
01792|       let confirmedCount = 0
01793|       const failedTxs: number[] = []
01794| 
01795|       for (let i = 0; i < txSteps.length; i++) {
01796|         const step = txSteps[i]
01797|         console.log(`Step ${i + 1}/${txSteps.length}: ${step.stepId}`, {
01798|           to: step.to,
01799|           value: step.value.toString(),
01800|         })
01801|         try {
01802|           const hash = await sendTx(wagmiConfig, {
01803|             to: step.to,
01804|             data: step.data,
01805|             value: step.value,
01806|           })
01807|           console.log(`Step ${i + 1} (${step.stepId}) submitted:`, hash)
01808|           toast.info(`${step.stepLabel} ${i + 1}/${txSteps.length} submitted...`)
01809| 
01810|           // Wait for on-chain confirmation
